title: Word 3 - BLOCK TALK (TEN WORDS translation)
body:
# Word 3 - BLOCK TALK (TEN WORDS translation)
## 5.9b
## 'I got a reason for word 2.  The reason for word 2 is because of something about _me_. But it's also something about you. Your special image comes from the special father and mother pair I am making in a big special marriage. My image is male and the female paired: in this special marriage image, the female is my nation, my people.  But who is the male in this big special marriage image? I already tell you I only  your God.  I also already tell you my name is Yahweh, but I have _another_ name. This name is the male in the big special marriage image. Here's my other name for you, my special marriage name: El-Qana, GOD-the down-here-on-the-ground-in-your-face-always-pushing-never-stopping-super-only-head-husband Word Bodyguard . Here is the reason my name is Head-Husband-Word -Bodyguard: 

' 
## 5.10
## I, Yahweh, the Head-Husband Word-Bodyguard, ALWAYS guard my special marriage image. Only the two can be one. I never stopping always keeping the two to be one, keeping my special marriage image and guarding it. I am the head, and I guard my body, my wife.

### some more ideas 

## I, Yahweh, the head husband word bodyguard guard my special marriage image. Only the two can be one. I never stopping always keeping the two to be one, keeping my special marriage image and guarding it.

## I am guarding the two becoming one. I am guarding my special marriage image. I'm guarding my wife, my people. When the two of us become one and make a new image, children, I guarding this image too. 

## El-Qana, GOD-the down-here-on-the-ground-in-your-face-always-pushing-never-stopping-super-only-head-husband Word Bodyguard . Here is the reason my name is Head-Husband-Word -Bodyguard

## I'm always showing up, in the tiny things and the big. I visiting the tiny one person in my people face to face, and I also visiting the big groups in my people, down on the ground. I never stopping this, I always pushing hard. I am the super only. 

## I show up to every single part of my wife, my people. I visit every single one. I come down to every single person, and push to guard my special marriage image, and all the images that keep coming out, even the smallest seed.

## I, the head husband word bodyguard, I am always visiting, never stopping, on the ground, face to face. When one person, even just one little person with one little life, loves on me, I love back big. If this one little person loves me with their little life, and keeps my commandments, and loves to love me, I will love back too big for their one little life. I will love 1000 of this person's Sons and sons of sons. I will love them with a never stopping, always pushing, super only Faithful Love that is too big to fit in their one little life, and that Love Will keep going after  thousands of their children and chasing a thousand of their children's children.


## I, the head husband word bodyguard, I am always visiting, never stopping, on the ground, face to face. When one person, even just one little person, with their one single life, hates me, I guard my special marriage image big, too big for their one little lifetime. I will make sure that, no sneaking works. No hiding from the word bodyguard, no getting away. They will not be able to make their own fake marriage image in my special wife. I will not let them build their own version of my special marriage image. They will not last, and they will not be able to keep making their fake image. I will make sure when they try to twist and break my special marriage image on purpose, that the action they did doesn't go away from them. I will make sure that the bad action they did, stays with them and on them. It will come after them and catch up to them. It will follow them for their whole tiny lifetime, four generations. When they break my special image, I will make sure that this breaking they did, sticks to them, to their sons, and to their grandsons. No matter how hard they try to separate their yucky action from themselves, and pretend so they can keep it hidden. I will always push, and I will not be lazy and just do nothing. I will not miss anything, and nothing will be hidden. I will show up against this person who hates me face to face. They will not go scot-free, that's not how I, the head husband word bodyguard moves.





## when I'm guarding that image I'm doing two things...

**Reference for Hebrew** #187

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: So in the latter half of Deuteronomy 5:9b and on through verse 10 we have a description of God's dealings en-totale with all individual humans from the perspective of starting with covenantal heads and dividing all covenantal heads into two hypothetical groups: those hating me and those loving me. It is helpful to keep in mind that hated and loved are Torah covenantal terms for rival wives

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: The word super is reminiscent of superheroes and for children will help connect the idea to a hero and avenger and a defender. He is the covenantal and covenant avenger and defender. In fact the zealous one his zeal is associated with his action that is in this verse that says he visits. He shows up and he acts locally and powerfully. Isaiah 63 picks this up multiple places all over scripture numbers 10 associate his zeal with his name and with his local powerful actions on behalf of the covenant.

comments.author: joshualinog

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
- a local covenant enforcer 
- A law enforcement officer
- a local Torah enforcement officer 


Consider the things that Yahweh is going to be doing in ward 3 he is going to be not far away but close on the heels of he's going to be causing the iniquities of haters to be visited to them in a timeline and he's going to be causing wondrous loyal love acts to come on those who are loving him

So both of these speak to the idea of The nearness of the name The nearness of the function of the name not the far awayness 

If it is connected to adultery and children if it is connected to joining lines or joining seed in creating lines then you may want to imagine the husband who goes far away or the husband who is aloof 

He is not the aloof husband

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
the structure of word three can be divided into two basic parts

1. a therefore (causal relationship to word 2) identity/name declaration
2. two lopsided/disproportionate nodes of action that are the consequents of the identity/name or that typify the identity/name that the identity/name performs.
     - doing/performing loyal as a guardian enforcer (notzer in exodus 34) to a thousand

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
should I say here's the reason, or should I say here's the work of the super only in two poles?

I say something like here's what that looks like, it looks like these two things.

or at least hear the two ends of what it looks like??

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
> should I say here's the reason, or should I say here's the work of the super only in two poles?
> 
> I say something like here's what that looks like, it looks like these two things.
> 
> or at least hear the two ends of what it looks like??
is he super only in general or is he super only in regards to the Covenant the Torah covenant? is he super only as a husband? should the Covenant of the Torah be conceptualized as the union of husband and wife, and here he's telling you what kind of husband he is. 

therefore is the super only actually something like a husband. is a husband a covenant Enforcer? I don't think so unless I'm wrong about husband :)

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
I include father and mother male and female image in the Heavenly form of God's male female pairs that people bow down to as father mother and worship them and imitate them as father mother when they try to live out their lives as husbands and wives and father and mothers.

I think I should include an explicit reference to husbands and wives the production of seed generationally and slaying and cutting down and cutting back and blocking via slain versus growing flourishing increasing

here husband is like Lord husband is like master Baal

Baal is the Hebrew word for husband. El is the heavenly King ruler in the heavens, and Baal is the Earthly Avatar and instantiation of El.

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
"For the Canaanites and the ancient Levantine region as a whole, ʼĒl or ʼIl was the supreme god, the father of mankind and all creatures.[33] He also fathered many gods, most importantly Baal, Yam, and Mot, each sharing similar attributes to the Greco-Roman gods: Zeus, Poseidon, and Hades respectively.

As recorded on the clay tablets of Ugarit, El is the husband of the goddess Asherah."
 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/El_(deity)#:~:text=For%20the%20Canaanites,goddess%20Asherah.

- locality 
- the one who shows up 
- shows up and gets it done 
- down here guy 
- the here and now guy who shows up 
- the one who shows up when you call the name Yahweh is El qana
- Yahweh is in the heaven, and when he shows up here to get things done he is called el qana
- when someone in the earth calls on the name Yahweh this is who shows up : El qana
- in order to fulfill the covenant Yahweh has to do things here and now on the Earth, the one who shows up to do yahweh's part on the earth in the here and now is el qana

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
## In regards to keeping the words keeping the promises in the covenant, maintaining the 10 words which are themselves promises:
- promise keeper 
- promise keeping 
- word guarding 
- guarding word 
- keeping word 
- word keeping 
- word keeper 
- word guardian 
- guardian word 
- keeper word 
- word protector
- word police
- word enforcer 
- word guard
- word bodyguard

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body: Word bodyguard is the way I'm going, it speaks to The Head and the body the word as the name incarnate God and the word bodyguard shows in English the kind of behavior a promise and word enforcer would engage in and it also speaks to husbandly behavior which word three is mirroring in word 8
